experience_level.description: Seniority level of the role. Higher seniority is generally associated with significantly higher salaries.

company_size.description: Size of the employing company, typically correlated with compensation budget.

is_abroad.description: Whether the employee resides in a different country from the company location — a proxy for international hiring arrangements, which may involve salary adjustments relative to local market rates.

values.true: Employee resides in a different country from the company
values.false: Employee and company are in the same country

company_location.description: Geographic region of the company, derived from country code. Countries that appear frequently enough in the dataset are kept as distinct values; less frequent countries are grouped into broader geographic regions to avoid sparse categories.

values.Europe (other): Other European countries (IT, NL, CH, PL, etc.)
values.Middle East / Africa: UAE, Iran, Iraq, Turkey, Nigeria, Kenya
values.Asia: China, Japan, Singapore, Malaysia, Pakistan, Vietnam

job_title.description: Specific role title within the data science field. Titles range from hands-on technical roles (e.g. Data Engineer, ML Engineer) to managerial/leadership roles (e.g. Head of Data Science, Director of Data Engineering) and specialist roles (e.g. NLP Engineer, Computer Vision Engineer).
